anomalies.insight: Bangalore fell 22% vs Saturday (1,568 vs 2,005) and 2.6σ below range — the single largest city drag at 34% of total decline. Saturday was Bangalore's peak day; Sunday reversal this sharp is beyond the expected pattern (the 7-day mean for Bangalore is ~1,730). Both App/web (−329) and B2B/Others (−75) are contributing. Check if Saturday had a Bangalore-specific campaign or featured placement that ended, and confirm whether Sunday phlebo capacity in Bangalore is adequate.

App/web fell 17% vs Saturday (5,589 vs 6,706) and accounts for 87% of total decline. This is the expected Saturday→Sunday App/web drop but the magnitude is larger than the 7-day norm (mean ~5,997). Saturday's App/web number was elevated — verify whether a Saturday App notification campaign or flash sale inflated the base, making today's decline look sharper.

Bangalore App/web down 25% vs Saturday (1,010 vs 1,339) and 1.6σ below range — confirming App/web is the primary channel driving Bangalore's city-level decline. The two signals (Bangalore city and Bangalore App/web) are the same root cause. Investigate whether Saturday had a Bangalore-targeted App push notification or featured SKU that drove outsized Saturday performance.

21:00 slot fell 32% vs Saturday (521 vs 768) and 2.1σ below range — contributing 19% of total decline. Late-evening demand weakening on Sunday relative to Saturday is a known pattern, but the 7-day mean for 21:00 is ~614, making today's 521 genuinely below baseline. Check if a Sunday evening notification was sent and whether the 21:00 slot had adequate phlebo coverage.

CBC via App/web fell 19% vs Saturday (608 vs 746) and 2.6σ below range — contributing 11% of decline. CBC is 1mg's highest-volume test; this level of App/web drop for CBC is significant. Check if App/web search ranking or category placement for CBC changed over the weekend.

Upsell grew 13% vs Saturday (2,042 vs 1,802) and 1.2σ above range — the key bright spot, offsetting 19% of total decline. Upsell performing well on Sundays is a sustained pattern. The algorithm appears to be effectively cross-selling to Sunday walk-in and Pickup Points traffic. Review which SKU combinations are driving Upsell on Sundays to optimise further.

17:00 slot fell 21% vs Saturday (423 vs 536) and 2.5σ below range. Evening slots 17:00, 20:00, and 21:00 all declining simultaneously on Sunday points to a structural evening demand drop vs Saturday — likely customers not booking same-day evening slots on Sundays. Consider targeted Sunday evening push notifications to recover this.

PPBS via App/web fell 19% vs Saturday (343 vs 424) and 3.5σ below range — the highest severity decline anomaly today. Post-meal blood sugar testing is time-sensitive (requires eating first); reduced Sunday afternoon demand for this test is partially expected, but the severity suggests a possible App/web ranking or slot availability issue specifically for PPBS.

anomalies.insight: Gold via App/web down 32% vs Saturday (506 vs 745) and 1.1σ below range. Full body checkup packages typically peak on Saturdays and dip on Sundays — this is expected. However, the Sunday figure (506) is below the 7-day mean (~630), suggesting the Sunday package demand is structurally weaker this week. Check if any Saturday-specific Gold promotion ended.

anomalies.insight: 20:00 slot fell 33% vs Saturday (509 vs 756) and 1σ below range. Along with 17:00 and 21:00, three consecutive evening hours are all below range — pointing to a broad Sunday evening demand shortfall vs Saturday. A coordinated Sunday evening notification strategy could help recover this.

CBC nationally fell 15% vs Saturday (1,037 vs 1,213) and 1.3σ below range. CBC is the highest-volume test; a national decline of this scale contributes 14% to total decline. Saturday had strong CBC demand — verify if a Saturday health camp or corporate order inflated the base.

Bangalore B2B fell 31% vs Saturday (170 vs 245) and 2.7σ below range. B2B orders in Bangalore dropping on Sunday is unusual — corporate/B2B orders should be less day-of-week sensitive. Check if a Bangalore B2B client placed a Saturday-specific order that did not repeat, or if Sunday B2B processing at the Bangalore centre is limited.

Lipid Profile down 25% vs Saturday (438 vs 580) and 1.4σ below range. Fasting requirement means Lipid Profile demand typically peaks on weekday mornings; Saturday demand was already elevated. The Sunday drop is expected but the below-range reading suggests the 7-day pattern is shifting. Check slot availability for morning Lipid Profile collections on Sundays.

Lucknow Collection Centre orders more than doubled vs Saturday (194 vs 73) — 1.6σ above range. Sunday walk-in demand at Lucknow collection centres surged while home visit demand dropped. This is consistent with Sunday phlebo shortages redirecting demand to walk-in points. Assess whether Lucknow has sufficient Sunday home visit phlebo capacity.

Lipid Profile via App/web down 34% vs Saturday (256 vs 389) and 1.5σ below range. Fasting tests via App/web drop on Sundays as customers are less likely to book same-day morning fasting collections. Consider a Saturday evening reminder notification for Lipid Profile Sunday collections to maintain demand.
